name: @effindomv2/fui-rs
description: EffinDom v2 Rust frontend framework SDK and host generators

scripts.generate:abi: mkdir -p build && esbuild ../abi/generate.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-abi.mjs && node build/generate-abi.mjs fui-rs-ffi && node build/generate-abi.mjs native-host-header && node build/generate-abi.mjs browser-host-enums
scripts.check:abi: mkdir -p build && esbuild ../abi/generate.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-abi.mjs && node build/generate-abi.mjs fui-rs-ffi --check && node build/generate-abi.mjs native-host-header --check && node build/generate-abi.mjs browser-host-enums --check
scripts.generate:host-services: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-services.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-services.mjs && node build/generate-host-services.mjs demo/src/host-services.ts demoHostServices crates/demo-shared/src/generated/host_services.rs fui::host_services
scripts.generate:host-events:home: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-events.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-events.mjs && node build/generate-host-events.mjs demo/src/host-events.ts demoHostEvents crates/demo-home/src/generated/host_events.rs
scripts.generate:host-events:workbench: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-events.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-events.mjs && node build/generate-host-events.mjs demo/src/host-events.ts demoHostEvents crates/demo-workbench/src/generated/host_events.rs
scripts.generate:host-events:stage4: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-events.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-events.mjs && node build/generate-host-events.mjs demo/src/host-events.ts demoHostEvents crates/demo-stage4/src/generated/host_events.rs
scripts.generate:host-events:stage5: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-events.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-events.mjs && node build/generate-host-events.mjs demo/src/host-events.ts demoHostEvents crates/demo-stage5/src/generated/host_events.rs
scripts.generate:host-events:immediate-drawing: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-events.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-events.mjs && node build/generate-host-events.mjs demo/src/host-events.ts demoHostEvents crates/demo-immediate-drawing/src/generated/host_events.rs
scripts.generate:worker-host-services: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-services.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-services.mjs && node build/generate-host-services.mjs demo/src/worker-host-services.ts demoWorkerHostServices crates/demo-shared/src/generated/worker_host_services.rs fui::host_services fui_host_service
scripts.generate:framework-host-services: mkdir -p build && esbuild scripts/generate-host-services.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node20 --packages=external --outfile=build/generate-host-services.mjs && node build/generate-host-services.mjs scripts/framework-host-services.ts frameworkHostServices src/generated/framework_host_services.rs crate::host_services fui_host
scripts.generate:host: npm run generate:host-services && npm run generate:host-events:home && npm run generate:host-events:workbench && npm run generate:host-events:stage4 && npm run generate:host-events:stage5 && npm run generate:host-events:immediate-drawing && npm run generate:worker-host-services && npm run generate:framework-host-services
scripts.lint:rust: bash -lc 'if [ -f "$HOME/.cargo/env" ]; then source "$HOME/.cargo/env"; fi; cargo clippy --manifest-path Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings'
scripts.build: npm run guard:runtime-dependency && npm run check:abi && bash scripts/build.sh
scripts.test:unit: npm run guard:runtime-dependency && npm run check:abi && npm run generate:host && bash -lc 'if [ -f "$HOME/.cargo/env" ]; then source "$HOME/.cargo/env"; fi; cargo test --manifest-path Cargo.toml'
scripts.test:integration: npm --prefix ../.. run build:v2:browser-bridge && npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run guard:runtime-dependency && npm run check:abi && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:abi && npm run lint && npm run lint:rust && npm run typecheck
